headline: Is NiSource (NI) Pricing Look Stretched After 27.5% One Year Share Price Rise?
summary: If you are wondering whether NiSource at around US$47.05 is offering fair value or a stretched price, it helps to look beyond the headline share price and into what the market is really paying for. The stock has eased about 1% over the last week and is roughly flat over the last month, yet it is still up 11.6% year to date and 27.5% over the past year, which hints that expectations and perceived risk have shifted over different time frames.
